title: Aphrodite's Nemo's Transit Expansion
body:
本模组还在开发测试阶段，如有问题请报告。   

支持从3.1.12到3.2.2的MTR版本

本模组在 [Zbx1425](https://modrinth.com/user/Zbx1425) 的 [MTR-NTE](https://modrinth.com/mod/mtr-nte)基础上开发而来，增加了更多新的特性：
- 外轨超高
- 游戏内的JS交互
- 更多的JS环境支持
- 混合构建器
- 更多的轨道限速
- ...

在所有事情开始之前，请先阅读[ANTE使用/开发文档](https://aphrodite281.github.io/mtr-ante/#/)

---

This mod is currently under development and testing. Please report any issues you encounter.

Supports MTR versions from 3.1.12 up to 3.2.2。

Developed based on [Zbx1425](https://modrinth.com/user/Zbx1425)'s [MTR-NTE](https://modrinth.com/mod/mtr-nte), this mod introduces additional features:
- Track cant (superelevation)
- In-game JavaScript interaction
- Extended JavaScript environment support
- Compound Creator
- More track speed limits
- ...

Before getting started, please read the [ANTE Usage/Development Documentation](https://aphrodite281.github.io/mtr-ante/#/).
